name: pakistan-health-indicators
title: Pakistan National Health Indicators (Time Series)
description: Long-format annual time series of Pakistan's core public-health indicators (life expectancy, infant/child/maternal mortality, immunization coverage, fertility, health expenditure, TB incidence, and more) compiled from the World Bank Open Data / World Development Indicators API.

fields.name: value
fields.description: Observed value for that indicator and year.

fields.name: unit
fields.description: Unit of measure for the value.
